app.name: XMaster
app.one_liner: A terminal-based X/Twitter client for developers and AI agents that unifies official API, web fallbacks, and xAI search into structured workflows.

screens.name: Main Terminal Interface
screens.purpose: Serve as the primary interaction point for all XMaster commands via CLI.

rust_commands.name: analyze
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve engagement metrics and insights (limited by premium access).

rust_commands.name: post
rust_commands.purpose: Publish a new tweet using official API or session fallback with pre-flight analysis.

rust_commands.name: reply
rust_commands.purpose: Post a reply to a tweet, optionally with engagement scoring and logging.

rust_commands.name: schedule
rust_commands.purpose: Locally schedule future posts with persistent storage.

rust_commands.name: search
rust_commands.purpose: Query X content via official API or xAI/Grok search.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add structured JSON output mode for AI agents
week 1: Build reply_outcomes table with extended metrics
week 1: Implement core post/reply commands with dual API/fallback support
week 1: Integrate local scheduling with file-based persistence
acceptance_tests: All commands must output valid JSON when --json flag is used
Command 'reply' must log outcome even if get_tweet() fails temporarily
Error responses must include x-transaction-id for traceability
Parallel test runs must not race on environment variables
